name: create_artifact
description: Create one normal Open Design project artifact entry file. Writes name+content, rejects existing targets, and persists artifactManifest when supplied. HTML, Markdown, and SVG entries get a default manifest when omitted. Project optional; defaults to the active project.

project.description: Project id (UUID) or name substring. Optional; defaults to the active project (expires after ~5 minutes of no Open Design activity).

name.description: Output path relative to the project root, for example "codex-product/index.html" or "deck.html".

content.description: Entry file contents. Use encoding="base64" for base64 content.

artifactManifest.description: Optional ArtifactManifest sidecar. If omitted, Open Design infers one for HTML, Markdown, or SVG entry files.
